content.verdict: Ninamu is the most extreme and most romantic honeymoon option in all of French Polynesia — an 8-bungalow private motu resort on the Tikehau atoll, completely off-grid, no Wi-Fi, no phones, no televisions, no other guests beyond 15-16 people at capacity. Owned by the Fabre family (Tahitian/French), the resort is built from coral stone, driftwood and thatched pandanus — handmade by the family and local craftsmen. The pink-sand beach wraps the motu, the reef is ten steps from your bungalow, and the lagoon is the densest in fish per cubic meter in French Polynesia (literally scientifically measured). Meals are served family-style at communal tables, cooked fresh daily by the team, and the all-inclusive package covers food, drinks, most excursions (snorkeling with mantas, coral garden drift, bird island), diving (on-site dive center is world-class), kite surfing lessons, paddleboards, kayaks, and sunset cruises. This is not a resort for couples who want overwater bungalows, butler service, or Instagram. It is a resort for couples who want Polynesia before resorts existed — barefoot, bare of connectivity, full of stars at night and a complete reset. Rated consistently #1 in French Polynesia on TripAdvisor for all the right reasons.
content.best_room: The Beachfront Fare is the honeymoon pick — handcrafted coral-stone-and-driftwood bungalow, king bed, outdoor shower, private deck steps from the lagoon. The Honeymoon Suite (when available) adds a larger deck and more secluded positioning. All categories are excellent; there is no bad room on Ninamu.
caveats: Absolutely no Wi-Fi, no cell service on the motu — this is a feature, not a bug, but be prepared.
Not for couples who need connectivity.
Family-style meals mean you share dinner conversation with other guests — wonderful for extroverts, potentially awkward for introverts (ask for a private table if preferred).
Not for couples who require an overwater bungalow — there are none.
Getting there requires a Papeete → Tikehau flight plus boat.
Weather can cancel excursions; build flexibility.
All-inclusive is a flat rate — confirm exactly what is included before booking.
Limited medical facilities on Tikehau; not ideal for couples with urgent medical needs.

faqs.q: Why is Ninamu rated #1 in French Polynesia?
faqs.a: Because it delivers an experience no other resort does: complete off-grid privacy, a private motu, world-class diving and snorkeling, family hospitality, and a total disconnect from the outside world. Guests consistently describe it as the single best trip of their lives.
Really. Basic communication (urgent calls) is possible via a satellite channel but there is no guest Wi-Fi, no cell coverage on the motu. You will be offline for the duration.

faqs.q: Is the diving really that good?
faqs.a: Tikehau's lagoon is among the densest in marine biomass in the world per Jacques Cousteau's 1987 surveys. The manta point, shark passes, and drift dives are destination-level. Ninamu has its own dive center with experienced instructors.
Air Tahiti flight Papeete → Tikehau (55 min, usually daily), then 20-minute boat transfer across the lagoon to Motu Ninamu.
Yes — meals, drinks, most excursions, paddleboards, kayaks, kite surfing lessons, and sunset cruises are included in the nightly rate. Diving is often a small add-on. Confirm specifics at booking.

Couples who want off-grid, nature-forward, intimate, sustainable Polynesia. Not for couples who want overwater bungalows, butler service, resort amenities, or 24/7 connectivity. If you need a pool and a spa, go elsewhere.

content.email_template:
Subject: Honeymoon booking — Ninamu Resort Tikehau, [dates]

Hi Fabre family,

We are planning our honeymoon and would love to stay at Ninamu for 7 nights arriving [date].

Could you please confirm:
- Availability and full all-inclusive rate for our dates
- Which bungalow you would recommend for honeymooners
- What is included in the all-inclusive package (meals, drinks, excursions, diving)
- Flight logistics Papeete → Tikehau and boat transfer timing
- Whether we can request a private dinner table one evening
- Diving and manta snorkeling availability during our dates
- Any honeymoon touches you can arrange

Thank you — we have read extraordinary things about your motu.

[Names]
